title: uragoga patrisii
intro: Uragoga patrisii, also known as Uragoga, is a plant species native to tropical regions, particularly in the Caribbean and Central America, belonging to the family Ebenaceae. The medicinal properties of Uragoga patrisii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Uragoga patrisii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Uragoga patrisii is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, where the leaves are steeped in hot water to release its medicinal compounds.
